prompt: Write a 400-word ICP refinement document for openpatent.ai. Cover: (1) the 5 ICP tiers ranked by LTV — (A) IP boutique law firms (5-40 attorneys), (B) AI startups Seed-Series-B with model/agent IP, (C) gov/defense TTOs + FFRDCs, (D) solo inventors with $50k+ household income, (E) IP-heavy corporate R&D (pharma, biotech, semiconductors), (2) the firmographic filters for each — headcount bands, funding stage, tech-stack signals (already using GitHub for code = higher conversion), geo (NA + EU + UK, no APAC yet), (3) the pain-points for each — (A) $400-$900/hr intake triage, (B) model-architecture regurgitation, (C) Bayh-Dole compliance + FOIA exposure, (D) idea-theft anxiety with no budget for a $15k attorney, (E) trade-secret litigation defense, (4) the trigger events — (A) new associate hire, (B) arXiv preprint publication, (C) SBIR/STTR award, (D) hackathon win, (E) M&A diligence prep, (5) the disqualifiers — not in NA/EU/UK, no GitHub presence, no evidence of IP creation, tobacco/vice verticals, (6) the 5 buyer personas per ICP — Managing Partner, CTO, TTO Director, Solo Inventor, General Counsel, (7) the messaging hooks that resonate — 'Bitcoin-anchored' for IP, '22/33 BFT' for AI, 'FedRAMP path' for gov, '$10 to disclose' for solo, 'prior art fortification' for corporate. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {icp_tiers:[5 strings], firmographic_filters:[5 strings], pain_points:[5 strings], trigger_events:[5 strings], disqualifiers:[4 strings], buyer_personas:[5 strings], messaging_hooks:[5 strings]}.
